title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALUGAN SCHOOL OF CRAFTSMANSHIP AND HOME INDUSTRIES IN BARANGAY ALUGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN POLICARPO, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, TO ALUGAN NATIONAL SCHOOL OF CRAFTSMANSHIP AND HOME INDUSTRIES

chunks.text:
H. No. 22845 / 88 OG No. 26, 4107 (June 29, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7464, April 28, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALUGAN SCHOOL OF CRAFTSMANSHIP AND HOME INDUSTRIES IN BARANGAY ALUGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN POLICARPO, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, TO ALUGAN NATIONAL SCHOOL OF CRAFTSMANSHIP AND HOME INDUSTRIES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Alugan School of Craftsmanship and Home Industries in Barangay Alugan, Municipality of San Policarpo, Province of Eastern Samar, is hereby changed to Alugan National School of Craftsmanship and Home Industries.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and February 6, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 28, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
